'''Base D8-Red''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Ubiqtorate/Legends|Ubiqtorate]] base on a stable [[Unidentified planetoid (D8-Red)|planetoid]] in the [[Ringali Shell]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Orbit" /> In existence by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> D8-Red was the staging area for Imperial undercover and covert operations in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], as well as the main launching point for operations in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. Housing thousands of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Agent/Legends|agents]], the base also had on hand hundreds of [[Imperial Naval Special Forces|SpecNav Force troopers]], an elite force in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. Additionally, D8-Red had a team of [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] and [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] who worked on creating new weaponry that could be used for covert operations.<ref name="Orbit" />

==Behind the scenes==
Base D8-Red was first mentioned in [[1998]]'s ''[[The Far Orbit Project]]'', by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]]. The book was a supplement to [[West End Games]]'s ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Orbit" />
